title: pelargonium × platanifolium
intro: Pelargonium × platanifolium, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium spp. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its essential oil. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mood, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and relieve pain. Rose Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or in aromatherapy to harness its medicinal properties.
